articles.title: Windows 11 Secure Boot Update Needed
articles.summary: Microsoft updates Windows 11 security. Older PCs may lose protection. Update Secure Boot by June 2026.
articles.impact: Your PC might not get future security updates without this.

articles.title: Street Fighter 6 Adds New Outfits
articles.summary: New outfits for Ingrid, Sagat, Alex, and C. Viper arrive. These are for Season 3 DLC. Get new looks.
articles.impact: Players can customize fighters with new styles.

articles.title: Samsung Gallery Drops OneDrive Backup
articles.summary: Samsung Gallery will stop saving to OneDrive. This happens later this year. Microsoft confirmed the change.
articles.impact: Users need a new way to back up Samsung Gallery photos.

articles.title: Sony Not Angry at Naughty Dog
articles.summary: False news spread on social media. A journalist was misquoted. It wrongly claimed Sony was mad.
articles.impact: Online rumors can easily mislead people about company relations.

articles.title: DELTARUNE Creator Needs Help
articles.summary: Toby Fox can't make DELTARUNE alone. The work is too much. His health is a factor.
articles.impact: Game development is demanding for solo creators.

articles.title: TheGamer Writers Unhappy with Pay
articles.summary: TheGamer writers got a new contract. It's pay-per-session. This means pay is inconsistent. They are heartbroken.
articles.impact: New payment systems can affect freelance workers' income.

articles.title: Powerful Semi-Truck Engines Listed
articles.summary: Some semi-truck engines are very powerful. This list shows 11 of the best. They haul heavy loads.
articles.impact: Engine tech is key for efficient goods transport.

articles.title: Antarctic Isolation Study Warns of Risks
articles.summary: Being stuck in Antarctica has risks. Long missions carry dangers. Isolation causes problems.
articles.impact: Long isolation can have serious psychological effects.
